commit.subject: LU-12187 tests: clean up sanity-lfsck/20[ab] style
commit.message:
LU-12187 tests: clean up sanity-lfsck/20[ab] style

Clean up the code style of sanity-lfsck test_20a and test_20b.
- use ((...)) for numeric comparisons
- use [[...]] for string comparisons
- use bash built-in for-loop instead of external "seq"
- use "stat -c %s" to get file size instead of grep output
- use "grep -c" instead of also calling "wc -l"
- precompute expected value for consistency with error message
- quiet several shellcheck warnings

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I2cbb9a313ca29c57de1bc300f93f0cf1a04898b2
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63519
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Maximilian Dilger <mdilger@whamcloud.com>
